mission: Define the canonical FrontendContractManifest strategy so every browser-visible Vecells surface consumes one generated authority tuple for route, runtime, design, projection, cache, accessibility, automation, and recovery posture.

assumptions.statement: Seq_050 binds every manifest to a stable RuntimePublicationBundle ref and AudienceSurfaceRuntimeBinding ref, but exact freeze and parity publication remains deferred to seq_051.
Seq_050 publishes stable design bundle and lint refs per audience-surface group so seq_052 can harden the bundle content without changing manifest identity.

defects.statement: Browser authority previously existed only as fragments across route inventory, gateway surfaces, cache refs, and future design/runtime placeholders.
Route-local ARIA and test markers could replace published accessibility and automation truth instead of sharing one coverage tuple.
Embedded patient channel parity remains deferred and therefore keeps the grouped patient transaction/recovery manifest out of publishable_live posture.

publishableLiveRequirements: Published DesignContractPublicationBundle with passing lint verdict
readOnlyTriggers: Design bundle or lint verdict stale
Projection compatibility constrained
Mutating controls frozen by RouteIntent or publication drift
recoveryOnlyTriggers: Route recovery, replay, grant re-entry, or watch tuple restore required
Runtime binding exactness unavailable but same-shell recovery must stay visible
blockedTriggers: Missing runtime publication bundle or blocked accessibility coverage
frontendContractManifests.rationale: Public intake may render governed placeholder and recovery posture only until exact publication, design, and parity tuples exist.
source_refs: phase-0-the-foundation-protocol.md#0.2 Continuity key and shell law
